title: Bobby1545 (Horror)
description: This mod adds Bobby1545 from creepypasta to your minecraft world.
body:
## 😱 Bobby1545
**This mod adds Bobby1545 from creepypasta to your minecraft world.**

**BETTER TO READ DESCRIPTION BEFORE YOU PLAY**


> ⚠️THIS MOD **IS NOT EXCATLY LIKE THE CREEPYPASTA** IT ONLY ADDS CREATURE, MODEL AND TEXTURES OF THE BOBBY1545. THIS **MOD IS CURRENTLY EXPERIMENTAL** IT HAS PROBABLY LOTS OF BUGS AND IT'S IN BETA⚠️ **(Thankfully this mod is going slowly out of Beta!)**
>
- In this mod you have an enitity (bobby1545) that **look for players and tries to kill them and scare them as much as she/he can.**

- **Bobby1545 will spawn in caves and on surface.** If any player is around 6-8 blocks away from the entity (THIS MECHANIC ONLY WORKS IN CAVES). Player will get darkness effect IV for around 4-5 seconds and Bobby will start attacking/running towards the player. 

- **There is also 2 more mechanics that only works on surface BUT MORE INFORMATIONS ON THAT IN DESCRIPTION OF VERSION 1.1.0**
